title: tmesipteris norfolkensis
intro: Tmesipteris norfolkensis, also known as Norfolk spear fern, is a species of fern in the family Psilotaceae. It is a small, terrestrial plant native to eastern Australia, characterized by its unique spear-like fronds. The Norfolk spear fern has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are believed to offer health benefits such as wound healing and relief from skin conditions.
